parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$results = @(); $disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\"; $beforeFree = $disk.FreeSpace; $results += \"Disk before: $([math]::Round($beforeFree/1073741824,2)) GB free\"; $tempDirs = @($env:TEMP, 'C:\Windows\Temp', (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'AppData\Local\Temp')); foreach ($td in $tempDirs) { if (Test-Path $td) { $items = Get-ChildItem $td -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -lt (Get-Date).AddDays(-7) }; $count = ($items | Measure-Object).Count; $items | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $results += \"Cleaned $td`: $count old items\" } }; $crashDumps = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'AppData\Local\CrashDumps'; if (Test-Path $crashDumps) { $dumps = Get-ChildItem $crashDumps -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($dumps) { $dumps | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $results += \"Removed $($dumps.Count) crash dumps\" } }; $npm = Join-Path $env:APPDATA 'npm-cache'; if (Test-Path $npm) { $cacheSize = (Get-ChildItem $npm -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum; if ($cacheSize -gt 524288000) { npm cache clean --force 2>&1 | Out-Null; $results += \"Cleaned npm cache (was $([math]::Round($cacheSize/1048576))MB)\" } }; $disk2 = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\"; $afterFree = $disk2.FreeSpace; $freed = $afterFree - $beforeFree; $results += \"Disk after: $([math]::Round($afterFree/1073741824,2)) GB free\"; $results += \"Freed: $([math]::Round($freed/1048576,1)) MB\"; $results -join \"`n\""
